title: Cobblemon Animon Voices
description: Download Animon - Cobblemon Anime Sound Replacement 0.6.1 on Modrinth. Supports 1.21.1 Minecraft. First Published July 27, 2024.
body:
Immerse Yourself in the World of Cobblemon with Authentic Anime Voices!

Experience Cobblemon like never before with our Anime Voices Resource Pack! This unique pack brings your favorite Cobblemon characters to life with engaging and immersive anime voiceovers, transforming your gameplay experience. Whether you are battling, exploring, or just hanging out with your Cobblemon, their vibrant personalities will shine through with every interaction.

Key Features:

Authentic Anime Voiceovers: Each Cobblemon character has been given a distinct and authentic anime voice, adding a new layer of depth and excitement to your gameplay.
High-Quality Audio: Enjoy seamless integration with the game thanks to our high-quality audio files, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable experience.
Regular Updates: We are committed to continuously improving and expanding our resource pack. Expect regular updates with new voices and features to keep your gameplay fresh and entertaining.
